title: Notification dated 15.12.2015 authorising Director AMD to exercise powers of entry and inspection under section 8 of the Act for the purpose of Atomic Energy (Working of the mines, minerals and handling of prescribed substances) Rules, 1984 (New Addition)

RI T Affirta- -cr7g-ir •1 al-Wrik* TTIT .3.01 (t91•1 5011P'-ii, Nit-A. 4Rfe 11114) qqii, 1984 * \irti arfifftzflt UM 8 * areff 'ART 74 W-4,Trir* R~ A1-11 1 etafA7 cf1 tl [ rA28/1/201545117] DEPARTMENT OF ATOMIC ENERGY ORDER Mumbai, the 15th December, 2015 S.O. 428(E).—In supersession of all such previous orders and in exercise of the powers conferred by Section 27 of the Atomic Energy Act, 1962, the Central Government hereby authorises the Director, Atomic Minerals Directorate for Exploration and Research (AMD) of the Department of Atomic Energy, Government of India or such other officers of the AMD as may be duly authorised by Director, AMD from time to time, under intimation to this office, to exercise the powers of entry and inspection under Section 8 of the said Act for the purposes of Atomic Energy (Working of Mines, Minerals and Prescribed Substances) Rules, 1984. [F. No. 28/1/2015 - ER] PRANAY VERMA, Jt. Secy.
